category_sources: Official documentation at https://coin-or.github.io/Ipopt describes Ipopt as a package for large-scale nonlinear optimization.
source_facts.description says Ipopt is an interior point optimizer.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the display name Ipopt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Ipopt documentation site.
source_facts.repo is the official repository; README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/coin-or/Ipopt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation at https://coin-or.github.io/Ipopt identifies nonlinear optimization solver functionality.
source_facts.description identifies an interior point optimizer.
